full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #18 (2026-05-01)

PULSE
Health: 0.4717 (C). 896 wallets, 155 contributors. 36 memos today vs 145 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
53 reward payments, 372007 PFT distributed to 28 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (30000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,000 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,500 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (70,400 PFT, avg 8,800/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): r4RPpe...WghS (67 memos). Fastest new contributor: rHWKHD...u2yC (1.8 memos/day in 4 days). 8 new wallet(s) this week. 29 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 81.8%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-01): 7205 transactions from 81 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
